Alarm, health, launcher, reminders, send_text, settings, timeline, toggle, weather, workout apps, and various Pebble firmware utilities and demos.

## Folders
- **[alarms](alarms/README.md)**: Alarm management and editing functionalities for Pebble firmware, including detail views and scheduling.
- **[health](health/README.md)**: Health app implementation for Pebble firmware, including data management, UI components, and activity, heart rate, and sleep metrics.
- **[launcher](launcher/README.md)**: Launcher app and glance management, legacy menu structures, and platform-specific header file.
- **[reminders](reminders/README.md)**: Implements a reminder application with voice dictation, timeline integration, and preference management.
- **[send_text](send_text/README.md)**: Text messaging application implementation for Pebble devices, with contact management and metadata functions.
- **[settings](settings/README.md)**: Settings application and modules for Pebble firmware, including menu, Bluetooth, display, notifications, and system settings.
- **[timeline](timeline/README.md)**: UI components, structures, and functions for managing and animating timeline elements in Pebble firmware.
- **[toggle](toggle/README.md)**: Toggle functionalities for airplane mode, motion-activated backlight, and Quiet Time in Pebble firmware.
- **[weather](weather/README.md)**: Weather application implementation for Pebble devices, including layout, splash screen, and warning dialog.
- **[workout](workout/README.md)**: Implements and manages workout applications, interfaces, data, and utilities for Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[activity_demo_app.c](activity_demo_app.c.md)**: Implements a debug application for activity tracking and insights on Pebble devices.
- **[activity_demo_app.h](activity_demo_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the activity demo application in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_fetch_ui.c](app_fetch_ui.c.md)**: Implements the user interface for app fetching, including progress tracking and error handling.
- **[app_fetch_ui.h](app_fetch_ui.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for launching the app_fetch_ui application in Pebble firmware.
- **[battery_critical_app.c](battery_critical_app.c.md)**: Implements a Pebble app to display a low battery icon using a custom window and graphics layer.
- **[battery_critical_app.h](battery_critical_app.h.md)**: Declares a function to get metadata for the battery critical application.
- **[hrm_demo.c](hrm_demo.c.md)**: Heart rate monitor demo application for Pebble firmware, handling HRM data and communication with a mobile app.
- **[music_app.c](music_app.c.md)**: Implements a music application for Pebble firmware, handling playback controls, UI updates, and event management.
- **[music_app.h](music_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata information about the music app process.
- **[notifications_app.c](notifications_app.c.md)**: Implements a notification management application for Pebble firmware, handling notification display, storage, and user interactions.
- **[notifications_app.h](notifications_app.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving metadata of the notifications app in Pebble firmware.
- **[watchfaces.c](watchfaces.c.md)**: Implements a menu system for selecting and managing watchfaces on a Pebble device.
- **[watchfaces.h](watchfaces.h.md)**: Defines the primary color for watchfaces and provides a function to get app information.
